title: Elytra Basics
quickAnswer: Elytra come from end ships attached to some end cities. Once you have one, combine it with fireworks for true flight and keep it repaired with Mending or phantom membranes.
keyFacts: Elytra change travel speed and safety more than almost any other single item upgrade.
Firework rockets provide powered flight, while the elytra alone mainly supports gliding and momentum travel.
Durability matters, so long trips are much safer once the elytra has Unbreaking and Mending.
commonMistakes: Thinking the first end city you find is guaranteed to have a ship.
Launching on a long trip with low durability and no backup landing plan.
